failure_modes: The checkpoint records workers/dkr-2/replay.sh, which does not resolve from the repository root.
The saved replay file is mode 664 and direct execution returned exit 126 before any hash or checkpoint check ran.
The independent replay returned exit 1 on a SyntaxError before any behavioral case ran.

wall_dispositions.reason: Neither saved nor independent behavior replay completed.
The behavioral baseline did not replay.
The separate validator exists, but its independent replay did not complete and cannot replace writer-only evidence.
Validator writes are confined to its authorized worker path and the run store verified before governed reporting.
Both replay failures are preserved and downstream advance remains blocked.

audit_traces.check: The checkpoint replay command executes and validates its hashes and fields.
All named hashes and executable checkpoint fields resolve through the saved replay.
audit_traces.evidence: The replay exited before sha256sum or validate-checkpoint-v2.mjs ran.

audit_traces.check: Independent scalar, stream, nested, isolation, uncooperative, original-error, and unhandled-rejection cases pass.
audit_traces.evidence: SyntaxError: Unexpected token ')' at independent-probe.mjs:429; no behavioral case ran.

audit_traces.check: Optional caller signal plus ExecutionContext.signal covers owner, caller, and running-flow control without public cancel.
audit_traces.evidence: The independent replay failed before owner, targeted caller, sibling, or flow observation cases ran.

audit_traces.check: Close aborts descendants, returns active stream iterators, joins descendants, classifies signal exits, then cleans resources.
audit_traces.evidence: The independent replay failed before ordering assertions ran; the checkpoint also leaves signal classification underspecified for a distinct original error thrown after abort.

audit_traces.check: The proposal remains generic Lite behavior with private bookkeeping and no session, cancel, start, spawn, pool, or task surface.
audit_traces.evidence: The independent replay failed before its source-surface assertions ran.

audit_traces.check: The OKRA run store verifies before governed validator reporting.
